response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech domain depth, or proven scaling of engineering teams to the required 30+ engineers. His agentic-AI contributions appear limited to tooling rather than core architecture, and there is no clear evidence of operating AI systems in regulated environments.
strengths: Diverse technical background with hands-on experience in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing
Proven track record in building and maintaining open-source platforms (e.g., GISCollective) with modern tooling and observability
Strong software craftsmanship ethos, including TDD, CI/CD, and tooling development (e.g., MCP code generators)
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people
Agentic-AI experience is limited to tooling and frameworks rather than core architecture or production deployment in high-stakes environments
Lacks direct fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, or regulatory compliance)
